_comment: DreamPicoPort source -> Roomba target. Same driving-pad layout as keyboard/roomba.json (so the SE on-screen/physical keyboard assist works identically) with the confirmed gamepad indices added as extra `actions` keys pointing at the SAME verbs. Gamepad indices from the regular pad, confirmed live via DreamPicoPortControl: buttons 0=A,1=B,3=X,4=Y,11=Start; axis0=left stick X, axis2=left trigger, axis5=right trigger, axis9=dpad(unconfirmed values). Triggers are BUTTONS for forward/back (operator's call): axis5(+)=drive-forward, axis2(+)=drive-back; turn-left/right uses axis0 sign. NOTE: no runtime consumer reads the AXIS/BTN keys yet -- ControlKeyboard only reads keyboard input; a gamepad-driving component is the next piece to build.
